commit.message:
Use 100dvh on app container instead of position:fixed on body

iOS Safari mishandles position:fixed on body, causing the bottom
gap. Switched to height:100dvh on the VoiceChat container which
is the proper modern iOS solution — dynamically adjusts to Safari
toolbar show/hide. Removed all position:fixed from body/root.
Version v2.4.

commit.message:
Add Gestor de Pedidos and fix all payment archiving paths

Bug fixes:
- procesarAprobPago: was not refreshing Archivo or Proveedor after marking
  solicitud as pagada; now fetches proveedor_id before update and calls
  _refreshAfterPayment()
- enviarOCPorCorreo (batch): was not refreshing Archivo or Gestor after
  marking OCs as enviada_correo=true; now calls _refreshAfterPayment()
- confirmarEnviadoAPagos: consolidated refresh logic into _refreshAfterPayment()

New helper _refreshAfterPayment(savedProvId):
  Refreshes Archivo>Pagos panel, Gestor de Pedidos panel, and proveedor
  detail panel if each is currently visible — called by all 3 payment paths

New Gestor de Pedidos tab in Proveedores section:
- Shows ALL ordenes_compra + solicitudes_pago grouped by proveedor
- Live search bar filters by proveedor name, folio, or description
- Each proveedor accordion shows: OC list + pagos list with status badges,
  amounts, dates, comprobante upload/link
- Header shows: processed count, comprobante count, total amount
- "Ver ficha" button opens full proveedor detail panel
- Comprobante upload (📎) refreshes the Gestor panel on success
- subirComprobante now accepts 'gestor' as refreshCtx

commit.message:
fix: use wrangler deploy with pages_build_output_dir for auto Pages detection

Newer wrangler uses pages_build_output_dir in wrangler.toml to
auto-detect Pages projects when running wrangler deploy. The explicit
wrangler pages deploy command conflicts with this new config style.

diff_hunk는 댓글당 수백~수천 토큰을 차지하지만 코드 수정/reply에 불필요.

  updated to include id, comprobante_url, comprobante_nombre; colspan

Fix PnL display: merge poller data instead of replacing

Poller covers ~25 accounts (enabled traders), but UI needs all ~129.
Changed from full replacement to merge strategy: poller overwrites
matching accounts with 1-second fresh data, direct Tradovate API
backfills all other accounts on its normal schedule. Staleness
threshold increased to 30s for poll cycle headroom.

REPS ARE THE ACHIEVEMENT, NOT WEIGHTS — fixed everywhere

This is the core principle of the program. The coach sets the test
weights. The athlete performs the reps. The reps reveal fitness.

Fixed in:
- coach.py: added CORE PRINCIPLE to system prompt
- psych_intake.py: baseline data now shows 'X reps at Y lb' not 'working weight Z lb'
- psych_intake.py: full profile data same fix
- app.js: baseline summary shows 'X reps at Y lb → Z lb working'
- app.js: title changed from 'Your Starting Weights' to 'Your Baseline Results'

commit.message:
Fix poller PnL cache: increase staleness threshold to 10s, upgrade logs

80 accounts in 41 token groups takes ~5s to poll. The 5s staleness
threshold meant early-polled accounts were already stale by read time.
Increased to 10s. Also upgraded cache hit/miss logs from debug to
info/warning for production visibility.

  query (was potentially failing and silently breaking the whole load)
- loadArchivoPanel: select only needed columns from both tables, log
  individual query errors to console for easier diagnosis, guard null container

specified in the deploy command. Also added CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID to
the workflow and passed D1 binding to pages deploy.

commit.message:
feat: replace N2YO with CelesTrak + SGP4 real-time satellite tracking

- New /api/tle endpoint fetches TLE data from CelesTrak with 4-hour cache
- satellite.js (SGP4) propagates exact positions client-side every frame
- AR tracker shows real-time satellite positions instead of 3-point interpolation
- Main page computes overhead + pass predictions client-side from TLEs
- Catalogs: visual, stations, debris (Cosmos 2251, Iridium 33), rocket bodies
- Shadow calculation determines if satellites are sunlit or in Earth's shadow
- No more API key dependency (CelesTrak is free, no key needed)

v11: Full app with profile tab, waitlist pools, toggle-off solo profiles

Three-tab layout (Map/Lounges/Profile) via CSS radio buttons. Profile shows Brian Song with 47 visited lounges, favorites (Turkish IST, SilverKris SIN, Cathay HKG), recently visited, saved lounges, active waitlist position with progress bar. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

add RTU gas heat section — block residential misdiagnosis on packaged units

Senior Tech incorrectly suggested checking a secondary drain pan on a
3-phase RTU (no such thing on a rooftop packaged unit). New RTU GAS HEAT
section explicitly states this, adds correct York 2-2 pressure switch
diagnostic sequence for RTUs, and distinguishes RTU cooling condensate
(limit fault) from heat pressure switch faults.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: dashboard settings profile form not populating fields The profile form used native elements with defaultValue="" and DOM manipulation via formRef.current.querySelector() to populate fields. This never worked because the form was hidden behind the loading skeleton when the useEffect ran, so formRef was always null. Converted to controlled React state + shadcn Input components. Also replaced with Next.js Image for avatar display. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context)

commit.message:
fix: async AI annotation to avoid CloudFront timeout (#322)

* fix: make AI annotation endpoint async to avoid CloudFront timeout

The AI annotation endpoint processes 60+ pages sequentially, exceeding
CloudFront's origin timeout. Returns 202 immediately and runs annotation
in the background. Added GET /ai-annotation-status endpoint for polling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: create AiAnnotationRun before 202 response to prevent race condition

Address CodeRabbit review: create the AiAnnotationRun record in the route
handler before returning 202, pass aiRunId to background job. Prevents
race where poller finds no record or a stale one. Also prevents duplicate
runs via ALREADY_RUNNING check. Status endpoint accepts aiRunId query param.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Fix selection frame rotation and auto-trim stale closure

  image proportions) instead of pw/ph (footprint), matching the image
  drawing inside the rotation transform

commit.message:
fix: map session roles to existing files + add download concurrency lock

telegram_sessions: map POLL→primary, DOWNLOAD_1→download, DOWNLOAD_2→search,
DISCOVERY→search. Prevents creating unauthorized session files that need
interactive login.

worker: add Redis lock to download_pending_files so only one download task
runs at a time, preventing SQLite contention on the session file.

commit.message:
fix: improve company name extraction for rating badge matching

- Rewrite extractRatings with two-phase approach:
  1. Parse summary section (【総合優先順位】) for bulk company→rating map
  2. Fall back to individual section search for unmatched files
- New extractSearchNames handles multiple filename patterns:
  求人票_会社名_日付, 数字_会社名, 会社名_Noxxxxxx, etc.
- normalizeCompanyName strips 法人格, converts 全角→半角, removes spaces
  for fuzzy matching (handles ＯＩＣ→OIC, レオパレス２１→レオパレス21)
- Summary matching uses bidirectional includes + normalized comparison

  health check, CI workflow, and docs

- Update Cambodia GMoneyTrans default service fee from 3000 to 2500
- Fix country dropdown query to filter soft-deleted records

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add closest-type estimation with differential diagnosis

When SCCmec type cannot be definitively assigned (Unknown, Partial,
Composite), estimates the most likely type(s) using weighted component
matching with sub-threshold hit evidence.

Key changes:
- parser.py and coverage.py return (hits, soft_hits) tuples, retaining
  sub-threshold alignments (>=70% identity, >=50% coverage) as soft evidence
- New lib/estimator.py: scores all 15 types against detected + sub-threshold
  genes using biologically-weighted importance (mec=1.0, ccr=0.8, regulatory=0.5,
  IS=0.3), ranks top 3 candidates with differential diagnosis rulings
- confidence.py calls estimator for non-Positive results, adds estimation
  block to JSON output
- TSV gets Estimated_Type and Estimation_Score columns
- HTML report shows estimation card with candidate table
- README updated with Staphit/Staphit2 integration examples

7 new estimator tests, 65 total passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: passwordless auth + devnet deployment script + SPL token setup

Authentication (zero passwords, zero PII):
- Wallet signature auth: challenge-response with nonce (crypto users)
- Magic link auth: one-time email link, custodial wallet created (mainstream users)
- Session management with 30-day tokens
- POST /api/auth/challenge, /api/auth/wallet, /api/auth/magic-link, /api/auth/verify-magic-link
- GET /api/auth/session, POST /api/auth/logout

Devnet deployment:
- Node.js deployment script (no Rust/Anchor needed for token setup)
- Generates backend keypair (saved to backend/keypair.json)
- Creates $CLEF SPL token (9 decimals, 1B supply)
- Auto-updates backend/.env with real token mint address
- Keypair generated: JBXDEbq2CXDUAUceE2MEWbF932pEBNC1JYBXpwKW74Uu
- Awaiting devnet SOL airdrop (faucet rate-limited, use faucet.solana.com)

Dependencies:
- Added @solana/spl-token to backend

commit.message:
fix: gate auto-simulate on workerReady to eliminate race condition

The auto-simulate effect fired when terrainReady became true, but the
worker might not have finished processing terrain yet. runSimulation
silently failed because terrainSentRef was still false. Now the effect
waits for workerReady, eliminating the 150ms timeout race condition.
